availability_slots.notes: Office hours for prospective PhD students

courses.title: Foundations of Machine Learning
courses.description: Core graduate introduction to supervised and unsupervised learning, with emphasis on theoretical foundations and practical implementation.

courses.title: Reinforcement Learning
courses.description: Graduate-level course covering Markov decision processes, dynamic programming, temporal-difference learning, policy gradients, and deep reinforcement learning.

courses.title: Probabilistic Graphical Models
courses.description: Graphical models, inference, and learning with applications to scientific modeling and causal discovery.

courses.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
courses.description: Upper-level undergraduate introduction to machine learning methods and applications.

courses.title: Advanced Topics in Reinforcement Learning
courses.description: Reading-intensive seminar on cutting-edge research in model-based RL, offline RL, and safe exploration.

courses.title: Algorithms
courses.description: Design and analysis of algorithms, complexity, and data structures.

courses.title: Causal Inference for Data Science
courses.description: Graduate course on causal graphs, potential outcomes, and causal discovery methods with applications in scientific research.

courses.title: Seminar in Machine Learning
courses.description: Weekly seminar featuring current research in machine learning and related fields.

courses.title: Climate Data Analysis and Modeling
courses.description: Methods for analyzing climate datasets and building statistical and machine-learning-based climate models.

courses.title: Time Series Modeling
courses.description: Classical and modern approaches to time series analysis, including ARIMA, state-space models, and deep temporal models.

events.title: Online Tutorial: Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
events.description: A two-hour tutorial on the basics of graph neural network models and their applications in scientific domains.
events.abstract: We introduce the fundamentals of graph neural networks, including message passing, pooling, and training strategies, with examples from chemistry and climate science.

events.title: Department Colloquium: Causal Inference for Scientific Discovery
events.description: Internal department colloquium on causal modeling in scientific applications.

events.title: Online Colloquium: Robust Causal Reinforcement Learning
events.description: Public colloquium discussing recent advances in robust and causal reinforcement learning.

events.title: Climate Modeling Seminar Series – New York
events.description: In-person seminar on uncertainty quantification in climate modeling.

events.title: Invited Talk: Graph Neural Networks for Climate Science
events.description: Keynote talk at a climate science conference on leveraging GNNs for multi-scale climate modeling.

events.title: CANCELED: Summer School on Machine Learning for Science
Keynote: The Future of Scientific Discovery with Machine Learning
events.description: Keynote lecture at an international AI conference.

events.title: Public Lecture: AI for Climate Policy
events.description: Public lecture on how machine learning models can inform climate policy decisions.

events.title: Online Panel: Ethics in Reinforcement Learning
events.description: Panel discussion about ethical considerations in deploying RL systems.

events.title: Workshop: Trustworthy AI in Healthcare
events.description: Past workshop on robustness, fairness, and interpretability in healthcare ML.

publications.title: Safe Exploration in Reinforcement Learning for Scientific Discovery
publications.abstract: We propose a framework for safe exploration in reinforcement learning tailored to automated scientific experimentation.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., Nguyen, D. K., & Rao, P. S. (2019). Safe exploration in reinforcement learning for scientific discovery. Journal of Machine Learning Research, 20(115), 1–35. https://doi.org/10.5555/jmlr.2019.123456

publications.title: Model-based Reinforcement Learning for Automated Experiment Design
publications.abstract: This paper introduces a model-based RL approach to designing informative experiments in physical sciences.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & Chen, M. (2020). Model-based reinforcement learning for automated experiment design. Nature Machine Intelligence, 2(8), 600–609. https://doi.org/10.1038/s42256-020-01234-x

publications.title: Offline Reinforcement Learning for Data-efficient Scientific Discovery
publications.abstract: We study offline RL algorithms in low-data regimes typical for scientific laboratories.
publications.venueName: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., Patel, S., & Wang, L. (2021). Offline reinforcement learning for data-efficient scientific discovery. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences, 118(42), e2101234118. https://doi.org/10.1073/pnas.2101234118

publications.title: Hierarchical Reinforcement Learning for Multi-scale Laboratory Automation
publications.abstract: We propose a hierarchical RL architecture to coordinate multi-scale laboratory processes.
publications.venueName: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & O'Connor, J. (2022). Hierarchical reinforcement learning for multi-scale laboratory automation. IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, 44(12), 12345–12358. https://doi.org/10.1109/TPAMI.2022.3145678

publications.title: Meta-Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Scientific Workflows
publications.abstract: We introduce a meta-RL framework that adapts scientific workflows to new experimental conditions.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & Nair, P. (2023). Meta-reinforcement learning for adaptive scientific workflows. Machine Learning, 112(5), 1753–1780. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10994-023-06234-1

publications.title: Graph Neural Network Models for Multi-scale Climate Dynamics
publications.abstract: We develop graph neural network architectures that capture multi-scale interactions in climate systems.
publications.venueName: Proceedings of the 42nd International Conference on Machine Learning
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., Chen, M., & Lee, H. (2025). Graph neural network models for multi-scale climate dynamics. In Proceedings of the 42nd International Conference on Machine Learning (pp. 1234–1245). https://doi.org/10.5555/icml.2025.987654

publications.title: Efficient Graph Neural Network Architectures for Molecular Discovery
publications.abstract: We propose efficient GNN variants that accelerate molecular property prediction.
publications.venueName: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & Gomez, C. (2023). Efficient graph neural network architectures for molecular discovery. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 36, 5678–5690. https://doi.org/10.5555/neurips.2023.192837

publications.title: Uncertainty-aware Graph Neural Networks for Climate Prediction
publications.abstract: We extend GNNs with uncertainty quantification for robust climate forecasts.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., Wang, L., & Davis, E. (2024). Uncertainty-aware graph neural networks for climate prediction. Climate Informatics, 5(2), 101–120. https://doi.org/10.1002/cli.2024.5678

publications.title: Bayesian Calibration of Climate Models with Parallel Tempering
publications.abstract: We present a Bayesian calibration framework for complex climate simulators using parallel tempering MCMC.
publications.apaCitation: Chen, M., & Müller, A. (2021). Bayesian calibration of climate models with parallel tempering. Climate Dynamics, 57(3–4), 1201–1219. https://doi.org/10.1007/s00382-021-05789-4

publications.title: Causal Representation Learning for Scientific Simulators
publications.abstract: We develop causal representation learning methods tailored to mechanistic scientific simulators.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & Patel, S. (2022). Causal representation learning for scientific simulators. Journal of Causal Inference, 10(1), 1–29. https://doi.org/10.1515/jci-2022-0034

publications.title: Practical Considerations for Safe Exploration in Reinforcement Learning
publications.abstract: A workshop paper discussing practical challenges in deploying safe RL algorithms.
publications.venueName: NeurIPS Workshop on Safety in AI
publications.apaCitation: Nair, P., & Müller, A. (2019). Practical considerations for safe exploration in reinforcement learning. In NeurIPS Workshop on Safety in AI. https://doi.org/10.5555/neuripsws.2019.112233

publications.title: Reinforcement Learning for Automated Experimental Design
publications.abstract: Doctoral thesis on RL methods for automating experimental workflows.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A. (2018). Reinforcement learning for automated experimental design (Doctoral dissertation, Technical University of Munich).

publications.title: Lab Automation with Machine Learning: A Technical Report
publications.abstract: Technical report summarizing tools and practices for ML-driven lab automation.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & Davis, E. (2024). Lab automation with machine learning: A technical report (Technical Report).

publications.title: Foundations of Machine Learning for Scientific Discovery
publications.abstract: Preprint outlining theoretical foundations of ML methods tailored to scientific problems.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A. (2026). Foundations of machine learning for scientific discovery. arXiv. https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2603.01234

publications.title: Early Experiments with Bayesian Optimization in Materials Science
publications.abstract: An early study on applying Bayesian optimization to materials design.
publications.apaCitation: Müller, A., & King, R. (2017). Early experiments with Bayesian optimization in materials science. Materials Informatics, 3(1), 45–60. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.matinf.2017.00456

projects.title: Graph Neural Networks for Multi-scale Climate Modeling
projects.description: Develops graph neural network architectures to represent multi-scale processes in the climate system, integrating observational data and simulations for improved climate modeling and prediction.

projects.title: Probabilistic Climate Modeling for Policy Decisions
projects.description: Builds probabilistic climate modeling tools that quantify uncertainty in future climate outcomes to support evidence-based climate policy and risk management.

projects.title: Bayesian Calibration of Earth System Models
projects.description: Applies Bayesian inference and advanced MCMC methods to calibrate complex Earth system models against heterogeneous climate observations.

projects.title: AI Tools for Assessing Climate Policy Impacts
projects.description: Develops machine learning models that link emissions scenarios to economic and environmental outcomes to help stakeholders assess climate policy impacts.

projects.title: Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Laboratory Automation
projects.description: Designs reinforcement learning agents that control automated laboratory equipment to optimize experimental campaigns in chemistry and materials science.

projects.title: Causal Representation Learning for Scientific Simulators
projects.description: Develops causal representation learning methods tailored to mechanistic simulators in physics, biology, and climate, enabling better generalization under interventions.

projects.title: Automated Experiment Design with Model-based Reinforcement Learning
projects.description: Uses model-based reinforcement learning to design informative experiments in materials science and synthetic biology under tight resource constraints.

projects.title: Machine Learning for Accelerated Materials Discovery
projects.description: Combines Bayesian optimization, active learning, and deep generative models to accelerate the discovery of functional materials.

projects.title: Trustworthy Machine Learning for Healthcare Decision Support
projects.description: Develops interpretable, robust, and fair machine learning methods for decision support in clinical settings.

projects.title: Foundations of Machine Learning for Scientific Discovery
projects.description: Explores theoretical foundations of machine learning algorithms when applied to scientific discovery, including sample complexity and uncertainty estimation.

projects.title: Graph Neural Networks for Molecular Discovery
projects.description: Designs efficient graph neural network architectures for molecular property prediction and inverse design tasks in drug discovery.
